title: Section 9
content: 1[9. Prohibition of hunting.---No person shall hunt any wild animal specified in 2[Schedules I and II] except as provided under section 11 and section 12.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 9, ibid., for section 9 (w.e.f. 2-10-1991). 2. Subs. by Act 18 of 2022, s. 6, for "Schedules I, II, III and IV" (w.e.f. 1-4-2023).
